You are working on an Android project located at:

D:\GITHUB\Beatloop - Music App

Follow this workflow strictly for EVERY task:

1. CONTEXT UNDERSTANDING

- First, explore and understand the existing codebase.
- Identify relevant files, dependencies, and architecture (MVVM, MVC, etc.).
- Do NOT assume anything. If unclear, ask or search within the project.

2. PROBLEM ANALYSIS

- Clearly explain the issue or feature request.
- Identify root cause (not symptoms).
- Mention exact files/classes/functions involved.

3. RESEARCH & BEST APPROACH

- Suggest the most efficient and modern approach.
- Follow Android best practices (Kotlin preferred, Jetpack libraries, etc.).
- Avoid hacks, deprecated APIs, or temporary fixes.

4. IMPLEMENTATION PLAN

- Break changes into small, logical steps.
- Mention which files will be modified/created.
- Keep changes minimal and non-destructive.

5. CODE MODIFICATION

- Generate clean, production-ready code.
- Maintain existing code style and structure.
- Add comments only where necessary (no over-commenting).
- Ensure no redundant or duplicate logic.

6. ERROR CHECKING

- Validate code for:
  - Compilation errors
  - Null safety issues
  - Lifecycle issues
  - Performance bottlenecks
- Fix issues BEFORE moving forward.

7. BUILD & DEBUG

- Ensure the project builds successfully.
- Provide steps to generate a debug APK:
  - Gradle command
  - Any required setup

8. OUTPUT FORMAT

- Always respond in this structure:
  A. Analysis
  B. Plan
  C. Code Changes
  D. Validation
  E. Build Instructions

9. RULES

- Do NOT rewrite the entire project unless explicitly asked.
- Do NOT introduce breaking changes without warning.
- Do NOT guess—verify from code.
- Prefer modifying existing code over creating new files unnecessarily.

10. WHEN STUCK

- Ask specific, technical questions instead of guessing.
